shared.notes: After archive+promote: migrate resolve --applied for baseline once; never db execute baseline SQL

greenfield.description: Disposable empty database — baseline + post-cutoff only
greenfield.notes: Active root must contain zero pre-cutoff folders before --execute

policies.data_migrations: Separate prisma/migrations/*/migration.sql steps; no hidden data in baseline SQL except optional system_seed.sql on greenfield
policies.raw_sql: Allowed in migration.sql; baseline uses migrate diff output only
policies.concurrent_indexes: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY forbidden inside Prisma migrate transaction — use non-concurrent or separate manual runbook
